exampleSentencesTranslated: I will call you after I finish work, okay then.
I will bring you coffee tomorrow morning, okay then.
Let's meet at the old cafe tonight, okay then.
exampleSentences: Anh gọi cho em sau khi xong việc, vậy nha.
Chị sẽ mang cà phê đến cho em sáng mai, vậy nha.
Tối nay mình gặp nhau ở quán cũ, vậy nha.
notes:
vậy nha = “okay then” / “alright then,” said in a friendly, soft way. It wraps up what you just said and signals agreement or closing.

It usually goes at the end of a sentence to make it lighter and more casual. The word nha softens the tone, like adding a friendly smile.

Very close to vậy nhé — same meaning, but nha feels more Southern and casual, while nhé is more common in the North.
notes_md:
**vậy nha** = “okay then” / “alright then,” said in a friendly, soft way. It wraps up what you just said and signals agreement or closing.

It usually goes at the **end of a sentence** to make it lighter and more casual. The word *nha* softens the tone, like adding a friendly smile.


Very close to **vậy nhé** — same meaning, but *nha* feels more Southern and casual, while *nhé* is more common in the North.

definitions.vi: Cụm từ dùng để kết thúc cuộc trò chuyện hoặc xác nhận thỏa thuận một cách thân thiện.
definitions.en: Okay then; alright then; used to wrap up a conversation.

content.sentence: Hẹn gặp em vào tối nay, ___.
Anh gọi cho em sau khi xong việc, ___.

translation.en: I'll call you after I finish work, okay then.
